items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has a durable chin.
items.quote: I don't think he's going to knock out BMW. I think Bumar's chin's too good.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis struggles against opponents with high-level boxing.
items.quote: I think that we have seen in multiple matchups in the past um even in the present in some moments that that he can struggle with guys that have good boxing

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's striking defense is poor.
items.quote: I just I can't I can't deal with the striking defense. It's just so bad.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has only won one fight in the last nine years.
items.quote: Conor McGregor has won one fight in 9 years.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not competed in five years.
items.quote: the last time he even stepped in the cage was 5 years ago.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is unlikely to have maintained his grappling skills during his layoff.
items.quote: do you really think that in Conor McGregor's preparation for this fight, the guy that's a part owner of BKFC, do you really think that Conor McGregor has been doing his jiu-jitsu classes? Do you think he's been doing his wrestling classes? I highly doubt that.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is prone to gassing out over five rounds.
items.quote: I think that McGregor could start hard. He could he could start fast and maybe he could gas out over five rounds.
